calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-27-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Leticia Perez. Petitioner Demitry L. Krylou was sworn and examined. The Court grants Petitioner's name changed to Dimitry L. Krilov. Decree signed.
